summary: Twin-Aware Risk Engine - COMPLETE. Backend: 22/22 tests PASSED (unit tests for _apply_twin_context, _twin_aware_inactivity, _build_reason, plus API integration tests). Frontend: BehaviorCard correctly displays Twin-Aware badge, personality_tag, and new anomaly types.

TestApplyTwinContext.test_boost_when_expected_active_but_low_: PASS - Score boosted from 0.3 when twin expects activity but interaction low
PASS - Score boosted from 0.25 when twin expects activity but movement low
TestApplyTwinContext.test_suppress_minor_deviation_during_res: PASS - Minor score (0.35) suppressed during expected rest
TestApplyTwinContext.test_boost_significant_activity_during_s: PASS - High score (0.65) not suppressed during sleep, type=twin_sleep_disruption
TestApplyTwinContext.test_no_boost_when_hour_not_in_rhythm: PASS - No change when hour not in twin rhythm

TestTwinAwareInactivity.test_low_score_during_expected_rest: PASS - Very low score (0.05) during sleep, type=expected_inactivity
TestTwinAwareInactivity.test_high_score_when_active_expected_but: PASS - Score > 0.5 when active expected but past limit, type=twin_inactivity_exceeded
TestTwinAwareInactivity.test_moderate_score_within_personal_limi: PASS - Score < 0.5 within personal limit, type=twin_active_expected
TestTwinAwareInactivity.test_very_long_inactivity_during_sleep_r: PASS - Very long inactivity raises score even during sleep
TestTwinAwareInactivity.test_generic_fallback_when_hour_not_in_r: PASS - Uses generic scoring when hour not in rhythm

TestBuildReason.test_twin_prefix_when_boost_reason_prese: PASS - Reason starts with [TWIN] when twin_context has boost_reason
TestBuildReason.test_no_twin_prefix_when_no_boost_reason: PASS - No [TWIN] prefix when no twin context
TestBuildReason.test_reason_for_twin_active_expected: PASS - Proper reason for twin_active_expected anomaly

TestBehaviorPatternAPITwinContext.test_response_has_twin_context_field: PASS - twin_context field present with confidence, expected_active_now, personality_tag
TestBehaviorPatternAPITwinContext.test_response_has_twin_anomaly_count: PASS - twin_anomaly_count = 0 (correct - DEV-001 has confidence 0.177 < 0.3 threshold)
TestBehaviorPatternAPITwinContext.test_twin_context_structure_when_present: PASS - All expected fields: twin_active, confidence, expected_active_now, personal_inactivity_max, personality_tag

TestGenericFallbackScoring.test_generic_scoring_without_twin: PASS - Generic z-score formula produces clamped score
TestGenericFallbackScoring.test_generic_inactivity_scoring: PASS - Global 60-min threshold used for generic scoring

BehaviorCard_DEV-001.personality_tag: PASS - Shows 'Late Starter · Low Activity' from twin_context
BehaviorCard_DEV-001.ANOMALY_TYPE_LABELS: PASS - Contains twin_active_expected, twin_inactivity_exceeded, twin_sleep_disruption, expected_inactivity

GET_behavior_pattern_DEV-001.note: twin_anomaly_count=0 is correct because DEV-001 twin confidence (0.177) is below 0.3 threshold for twin-aware scoring

critical_code_review_comments: Backend behavior_ai.py correctly implements twin-aware risk engine with 0.3 confidence threshold for scoring
Backend _apply_twin_context() boosts score when expected_active=True but metrics are low
Backend _apply_twin_context() suppresses minor scores during expected rest (expected_active=False)
Backend _twin_aware_inactivity() returns low score (0.05) during sleep time (expected_inactivity)
Backend _twin_aware_inactivity() returns high score when active expected but past personal limit
Backend _build_reason() correctly prefixes with [TWIN] when boost_reason present
Backend behavior-pattern API returns twin_context and twin_anomaly_count fields
Frontend BehaviorCard correctly displays Twin-Aware badge when risk.twin_aware is true
Frontend ANOMALY_TYPE_LABELS includes all new twin anomaly types
Generic fallback scoring works correctly when no twin or confidence < 0.3
context_for_next_testing_agent: Twin-Aware Risk Engine fully tested. DEV-001 has a twin with confidence 0.177 (below 0.3 threshold for twin scoring, but >= 0.15 for display). The twin_context shows in BehaviorCard with Twin-Aware badge and personality_tag. The behavior-pattern API returns twin_context, twin_anomaly_count, and current_risk.twin_aware. Unit tests for _apply_twin_context, _twin_aware_inactivity, and _build_reason verify the scoring logic. Falls back to generic scoring when no twin or confidence < 0.3.
